summary: The user is seeking new laces for their Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 37 and has recently purchased ASICS Gel-Kayano 28 from Amazon for $160. They are also considering a Specialized Purist Water Bottle and new cycling gloves after losing one of their Pearl Izumi Select Gloves during a group ride, and they are waiting for repairs on their Giant TCR Advanced bike, which is quoted at $120 for fixing skipping gears and a rusty chain.
facts: The user purchased ASICS Gel-Kayano 28 online from Amazon for $160.
The user is looking for new laces for their Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 37.
The user lost one of their Pearl Izumi Select Gloves during a group ride last month.
The user is considering getting a Specialized Purist Water Bottle, which is BPA-free and has a secure lid.
The user is using a Garmin Forerunner 945 to track their runs, bike rides, and other activities.
The user is waiting to hear back from the repair shop about their Giant TCR Advanced bike.
The user was quoted $120 for repairs on their Giant TCR Advanced bike.
The user reported that the gears on their Giant TCR Advanced bike were skipping and the chain was rusty.
